Curated Lookout run

This folder is a deliberate example, not a random CI log. Lookout ran against the examples/nextjs-demo Next.js app. The route /demo-a11y-bug contains a button with no accessible name on purpose. In CI, a short LOOKOUT_MOCK_ACTIONS script points the mock “LLM” straight at that URL so the run is reproducible; Lookout’s axe integration then records a11y violations (e.g. button-name).

Open report.html for the rendered narrative (tabs, goals, issues), or bundle.json for the raw export v2 record (goals, steps, issues, paths to screenshots/traces).
